description:
Specialized 3D scanning and post-processing software for Trackit 3D scanners.

Revo Track enables point cloud capture, post-processing, and multi-model alignment, empowering you to scan and process quickly.
1. Adds thin-walled object scanning function to track scan, enhancing the quality of scanning thin-wall objects.
2. Increases high-quality fusion with a "Noise Reduction" feature, optimizing model edges and removing redundant noise points.
3. Adds TCP control service, allowing third-party programs to connect and control Revo Track through a specified port.
4. Optimizes user experience.
5. Fixes some bugs.
